nasb.text: Put in it the pieces, Every good piece, the thigh and the shoulder; Fill it with choice bones.

esv.text: put in it the pieces of meat, all the good pieces, the thigh and the shoulder; fill it with choice bones.

cnv.text: 把肉塊，就是所有肥美的肉塊， 腿肉和肩肉，都放進鍋裡； 用上好的骨頭把鍋裝滿。

ccb.text: 把羊腿、羊肩等上好的肉块放进锅里， 让锅里盛满精选的骨头。
